Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 2026

This Privacy Policy describes how Organize with Mary (a Lucente project, "we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, and shares information when you visit trylucente.com (the "Site").

Information We Collect

We may collect the following types of information:

  • Email address — when you sign up for our email list via Kit (formerly ConvertKit).
  • Name — optionally, when you subscribe or purchase.
  • Purchase information — processed securely by Stripe. We do not store your payment card information.
  • Usage data — including pages visited, time on site, and referring URLs, via analytics tools (Google Analytics — see Tracking section).

How We Use Your Information

  • To send you the free content you requested (e.g., the Small Space Storage Checklist)
  • To send you occasional emails with organization tips, product recommendations, and updates
  • To process purchases of digital products
  • To improve our content and understand how visitors use the Site

Email Marketing

We use Kit (formerly ConvertKit) to manage our email list. By subscribing, you agree to receive emails from us. You can unsubscribe at any time by clicking the unsubscribe link at the bottom of any email.

Affiliate Links

Some posts on this Site contain affiliate links. When you click these links and make a purchase, we may earn a small commission at no additional cost to you. This does not influence our recommendations. See our Affiliate Disclosure for full details.

Cookies and Tracking

We may use cookies and third-party analytics tools including Google Analytics and the Pinterest Tag to understand how visitors interact with the Site. You can opt out of Google Analytics tracking by installing the Google Analytics Opt-out Browser Add-on.

Third-Party Services

We use the following third-party services which have their own privacy policies:

  • Kit (ConvertKit) — email marketing
  • Stripe — payment processing
  • Google Analytics — site analytics
  • Pinterest — social traffic analytics

Data Retention

We retain your email address and name as long as you are subscribed to our list. You may request deletion of your data at any time by contacting us.

Your Rights

Depending on your location, you may have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. To exercise these rights, contact us using the information below.

Children's Privacy

This Site is not directed to children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.

Contact

Questions about this Privacy Policy? Contact us here.

Organize with Mary

Renter-friendly organization for calm, clutter-free small spaces.
